creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Results are NEGATIVE for 6.0.5 :-(
1. 3D Viewer still drops "Unknown Error" and is inoperational.
2. File formats created with kicad-devel package are not compatible with kicad-6.0.5.

Looks like I am tied to devel for a while.

This 3D part is essential in my project because in iterations PCB is exported to 3D models that are then used by a mechanical team to create/adjust the casing then fixes are introduced to PCB that is then updated to match the casing etc.
